Explorations

Experiments

Concepts, prototypes, and thought exercises used to test ideas before they become products.

Product Intelligence · 2026

Adaptive Onboarding Prompts

Tested whether adaptive prompt sequencing could reduce onboarding friction in high-choice workflows.

UX Signals · 2025

Decision Confidence Indicators

Prototyped interface cues that communicate confidence in recommendations without overwhelming users.
